name: THERMR
description:
THERMR

THERMR generates pointwise neutron scattering cross sections in the thermal energy range and adds them to an existing PENDF file. It reads S(α,β) data from a LEAPR output tape or computes free-gas scattering when no thermal data are available. THERMR handles three types of scattering:
  • Incoherent inelastic scattering
  • Incoherent elastic scattering
  • Coherent elastic scattering (for crystalline materials like graphite, Be, BeO)
tooltip: Generate thermal scattering cross sections from S(alpha,beta) or free-gas models.

parameters.name: nendf
parameters.help:
'nendf'

Unit for S(α,β) input tape from LEAPR. Use 0 for free-gas thermal treatment.

parameters.name: matde
parameters.help:
'matde'

Material number on the thermal ENDF/LEAPR tape. Use 0 for free-gas thermal treatment.

parameters.name: matdp
parameters.help:
'matdp'

Material to be processed on the PENDF tape. Select the isotope and the MAT number will be chosen automatically.

parameters.name: nbin
parameters.help:
'nbin'

Number of equi-probable cosine bins for angular distributions.

parameters.name: iin
parameters.help:
'iin'

Inelastic scattering option:
None = no inelastic scattering
Free gas = free-gas scattering
S(α,β) = read S(α,β) from thermal ENDF tape

parameters.name: icoh
parameters.help:
'icoh'

Coherent/incoherent elastic option:
None = no elastic
Graphite = coherent elastic for graphite
Be = coherent elastic for beryllium
BeO = coherent elastic for BeO
Poly / ZrH = incoherent elastic (H in ZrH, polyethylene)
Al / Fe = coherent elastic for aluminium or iron
SiC = coherent elastic for SiC

parameters.name: natom
parameters.help:
'natom'

Number of principal atoms in the compound. Used for normalization of the thermal cross sections.

parameters.name: mtref
parameters.help:
'mtref'

MT number for the inelastic reaction on the thermal ENDF tape. Values range from 221 to 250 corresponding to different thermal scattering law evaluations.

parameters.name: temperatures
parameters.help:
'tempr'

Temperatures (K) for the thermal scattering calculation. Must match temperatures available on the LEAPR/thermal tape.

parameters.name: tol
parameters.help:
'tol'

Fractional tolerance for linearization of the thermal cross sections.

parameters.name: emax
parameters.help:
'emax'

Maximum energy for thermal treatment (eV). Cross sections above this energy are not modified.

parameters.name: iform
parameters.help:
'iform'

Output format for inelastic angular distributions:
E-E'-μ = (E,E',μ) ordering
E-μ-E' = (E,μ,E') ordering

(default=E-E'-mu)

parameters.name: iprint
parameters.help:
'iprint'

Print control flag:
min = minimum output
max = extended output

(default=min)
